title: Magnesium Analysis Protocol
author: John Stack
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y3zfyp6

steps.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for Magnesium analysis by running the Magnesium Calibrator and a Water Blank.

Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus a) Pipette 4 µL of sample into a cuvette slot. b) Add 350 µL of Magnesium Reagent. c) Mixture is incubated at 37ºC for 10 minutes d) Absorbance is measured at 600 nm.

substeps.instruction: Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus
Pipette 4 µL of sample into a cuvette slot.
Mixture is incubated at 37ºC for 10 minutes
